# 先降低前置增益，防止频段拉高后破音（剪切失真）
Preamp: -4 dB
# 削弱低频共鸣，减少声音的浑浊感
Filter: ON PK Fc 150 Hz Gain -3 dB Q 1.0
Filter: ON PK Fc 250 Hz Gain -2 dB Q 1.0
# 提升人声基音与清晰度核心频段
Filter: ON PK Fc 1000 Hz Gain 2.5 dB Q 0.7
Filter: ON PK Fc 2500 Hz Gain 4.5 dB Q 0.7
Filter: ON PK Fc 4000 Hz Gain 3 dB Q 1.0
# 压缩器提升低语、气音的表现
VSTPlugin: Library "F:\Program Files\VSTPlugins\ReaPlugs\reaxcomp-standalone.dll" ChunkData ""
